footer.desc: Trusted corporate legal counsel for businesses navigating complex legal challenges.

index.heroText: Langford & Associates delivers precise, results-driven legal counsel to corporations, startups, and entrepreneurs navigating today's complex business landscape.
index.practiceSubtitle: From formation to exit, we provide end-to-end corporate legal services tailored to your business objectives.

corporate.title: Corporate Law
corporate.text: Company formation, shareholder agreements, governance structures, and corporate restructuring for businesses at every stage.

ma.title: Mergers & Acquisitions
ma.text: Due diligence, deal structuring, negotiation, and regulatory compliance for M&A transactions of all sizes.

contracts.title: Contracts & Agreements
contracts.text: Drafting, reviewing, and negotiating commercial contracts that protect your interests and reduce legal exposure.

litigation.title: Litigation & Dispute Resolution
litigation.text: Aggressive representation in commercial litigation, arbitration, and mediation to resolve business disputes efficiently.
litigation.ariaLabel: Learn more about Litigation & Dispute Resolution

compliance.title: Compliance & Regulation
compliance.text: Helping companies stay ahead of regulatory requirements, audits, and industry-specific compliance obligations.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.text: Protection and enforcement of trademarks, copyrights, trade secrets, and IP licensing strategies for your business assets.

index.diffTitle: A Firm Built on Integrity & Precision
index.diffText: With decades of combined experience, our attorneys bring depth, clarity, and unwavering commitment to every client engagement.
index.diff1Text: Proven track record across industries including tech, real estate, finance, and manufacturing.
index.diff2Text: We listen first. Our strategies are tailored to your specific business goals, not generic templates.
index.diff3Text: We support cross-border transactions and international clients with local expertise and global perspective.
index.diff4Text: Your deadlines are our deadlines. We pride ourselves on timely communication and dependable delivery.
index.ctaText: Schedule a confidential consultation with one of our attorneys and discover how Langford & Associates can support your legal needs.

about.heroText: A legacy of integrity, precision, and results-driven corporate counsel.
about.storyTitle: Built on a Foundation of Trust
about.storyP1: Founded in 2001, Langford & Associates was established with a clear mission: to provide businesses with the precise, strategic legal counsel they need to grow, protect their interests, and navigate complexity with confidence.
about.storyP2: Over more than two decades, we have grown from a boutique corporate firm into a full-service legal practice with a reputation for excellence across industries — from emerging technology startups to established multinational corporations.
about.storyP3: Our approach has always been the same: understand your business deeply, anticipate legal risks before they become problems, and deliver solutions that are as practical as they are legally sound.
about.value1Text: We hold ourselves to the highest ethical standards in every client relationship, every negotiation, and every courtroom.
about.value2Text: Details matter in law. We approach every matter with rigorous analysis and meticulous attention to the facts that shape outcomes.
about.value3Text: We don't just advise — we partner with our clients, aligning our success with theirs and investing in long-term relationships.
about.teamSubtitle: Each member of our team brings deep expertise and a genuine commitment to our clients' success.
about.attorney1Alt: Portrait of Richard Langford, Managing Partner
about.attorney1Bio: With over 25 years of experience, Richard has led hundreds of corporate transactions and is widely recognized as one of the leading M&A attorneys in the region.
about.attorney2Alt: Portrait of Margaret Ashford, Senior Partner
about.attorney2Bio: Margaret leads our compliance practice, advising Fortune 500 companies and fast-growing startups on navigating complex regulatory environments across multiple jurisdictions.
about.attorney3Bio: Daniel is a seasoned litigator with a track record of success in high-stakes commercial disputes, arbitrations, and international litigation proceedings.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Work With Our Team?
about.ctaText: Schedule a confidential consultation and let us show you what Langford & Associates can do for your business.

practiceAreas.heroText: Comprehensive corporate legal services tailored to your business at every stage.

corporate.title: Corporate Law
corporate.text: Our corporate law practice covers the full lifecycle of business entities — from initial formation and governance to restructuring and dissolution. We advise boards, executives, and shareholders on their rights, obligations, and strategic options at every stage of growth.

ma.title: Mergers & Acquisitions
ma.text: M&A transactions are among the most complex and high-stakes events in a company's life. Our team provides end-to-end guidance — from initial strategy through due diligence, negotiation, regulatory filings, and post-closing integration.

contracts.title: Contracts & Agreements
contracts.text: A well-drafted contract is your first line of legal defense. Our attorneys draft, review, and negotiate commercial agreements that clearly define rights and obligations, minimize ambiguity, and protect your business interests in every transaction.

litigation.title: Litigation & Dispute Resolution
litigation.text: When disputes arise, you need experienced advocates in your corner. Our litigation team combines strategic thinking with aggressive representation to protect your business in court, arbitration, or mediation — always with your best outcome in mind.

compliance.title: Compliance & Regulation
compliance.text: Staying ahead of regulatory requirements is not optional — it is essential to your business's survival and reputation. Our compliance team helps companies build robust programs, respond to audits, and navigate industry-specific regulations across multiple jurisdictions.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.text: Your intellectual property is one of your most valuable business assets. We help companies protect, manage, and monetize their IP portfolio — from trademark registration to complex licensing negotiations and enforcement actions against infringers.
ip.s5: IP due diligence in M&A transactions

practiceAreas.ctaText: Schedule a confidential consultation with one of our attorneys. We will assess your situation and recommend the right legal strategy for your business.

blog.heroText: Analysis, updates, and practical guidance from our attorneys.
blog.featuredTitle: The New Corporate Transparency Act: What Business Owners Must Know in 2026
blog.featuredExcerpt: The Corporate Transparency Act (CTA) has introduced sweeping new reporting requirements for millions of U.S. businesses. Failure to comply can result in significant civil and criminal penalties. Here is what you need to know and the steps you should take immediately to ensure your company is in compliance.
blog.featuredReadAriaLabel: Read: The New Corporate Transparency Act
blog.card1Title: Due Diligence Checklist for Cross-Border Acquisitions
blog.card1Excerpt: Cross-border M&A deals present unique legal challenges. Our attorneys outline the essential due diligence steps to protect your interests.
blog.card2Title: GDPR in 2026: Key Updates Every Global Business Should Know
blog.card2Excerpt: Data privacy regulations continue to evolve. Here is a practical overview of the latest GDPR amendments and their impact on your business.
blog.card3Title: When to Choose Arbitration Over Litigation in Commercial Disputes
blog.card3Excerpt: Arbitration and litigation each have distinct advantages. Understanding when to pursue each path can save time, money, and business relationships.
blog.ctaText: Our attorneys are available for confidential consultations. Let us help you find the right path forward.

blogPost.articleCtaText: Our corporate team is available for confidential consultations to assess your specific obligations and guide you through the filing process.
blogPost.sidebarAuthorBio: Richard specializes in corporate law and M&A with over 25 years of experience advising Fortune 500 companies and emerging businesses.
blogPost.sidebarCtaText: Have questions about your legal obligations? Our attorneys are ready to help.
